description_long: This is a matte black cup with a rounded, slightly faceted body and a sturdy, thick handle. The cup features two geometric, wireframe-style patterns on one side, one in light blue and the other in light purple, resembling abstract polygonal shapes. The interior is deep and cylindrical, suitable for holding liquids. The handle is robust and smoothly integrated into the body, providing a comfortable grip. The surface appears non-reflective and has a soft, almost velvety finish. There are no visible logos or text, but the decorative wireframe motifs add a modern, artistic touch.
description: A matte black cup with a thick handle and two colorful geometric wireframe patterns on one side, featuring a modern, artistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cup's handle on the right and two geometric wireframe patterns in blue and purple on the body.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and no visible patterns or decorations, highlighting the cup's plain matte black surface.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, showing the cup's smooth, faceted body and no visible patterns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a partial glimpse of the blue wireframe pattern, handle not visible.
